calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Worldwide Asset Purchasing, II, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Stefan J. Gosiewski.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 28, 2009.
Declaration of Melissa McLellan in Lieu of Live Testimony pursuant CCP Section 98 was filed today, May 4, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, May 4, 2009.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Worldwide Asset Purchasing, II, LLC, and against defendant Stefan J. Gosiewski as follows:

Principal - $3,074.41.
Interest - $1,217.97.
Costs - $378.25, for a total judgment in the amount of $4,670.63.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court for review no than May 8, 2009.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And For Nonetary Sanctions,Notice Of Submission
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Stefan J. Gosiewski, Defendant appeared in Propria Persona
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Worldwide Asset Puschasing, 11, LLC's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The filing was untimely per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion must be filed as well as served 16 court days prior to the hearing, plus 5 days for service by mail. This motion was filed on March 9, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Establish Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions, Notice Of Submission
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Stefan J. Gosiewski, Defendant appeared in Propria Persona
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Worldwide Asset Puschasing, 11, LLC's Motion To Establish Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The filing was not timely per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion must be filed as well as served 16 court days prior to the hearing, plus 5 days for service by mail. This motion was filed on March 9, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
